description: A graphic styled as a screenshot of a post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump'. The body is an emblem of a gold and white eagle with outstretched wings holding an olive branch in one talon and a bundle of arrows in the other, with a striped shield on its chest and a row of stars above. Below in large dark-blue serif capitals is the word 'NICE', and beneath that 'NATIONAL IMMIGRATION AND CUSTOMS ENFORCEMENT'.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump; @realDonaldTrump; NICE; NATIONAL IMMIGRATION AND CUSTOMS ENFORCEMENT
